positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial forest scene. Central composition featuring stylized silhouettes of ancient trees, glowing astral bodies, and floating geometric celestial patterns. The artwork must utilize clean, thick linework reminiscent of a woodcut print or intricate etching. Emphasize deep, contrasting colors of midnight blue, forest green, and brilliant gold accents. The composition should feature strong negative space and a symmetrical radial balance, perfect for printing on fabric. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Zodiac Constellations. Aspect: Centered, stylized illustration, graphic design, vector art, maximalism, highly detailed.
negative: low detail, blur, noise, signature, watermark, text, words, letters, amateur, poor anatomy, ugly, cropped, out of focus, extra limbs, multiple subjects, oil painting, photograph, realistic, grayscales only
